response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering skills across multiple languages and domains, but his experience in C++ is limited (only ~1 year at National Instruments, with no recent use in leadership roles). While he has cloud-related experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), it lacks the large-scale distributed systems focus required for a cloud compute platform lead. His leadership experience is mostly in small teams or as a founder, not in a mid-senior technical leadership role for compute infrastructure.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages (C++, D, TypeScript, JavaScript, etc.)
Proven ability to deliver high-performance systems (low-latency apps, real-time data handling)
Strong open-source contributions and community involvement (workshops, talks, GitHub projects)
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (only ~1 year, not recent or leadership-focused)
Limited direct experience with large-scale cloud compute platforms or distributed systems architecture
No clear evidence of technical leadership in mid-senior roles (founder role doesn't meet minimum leadership requirement)
